hero.headline: Galgotias University Online MBA in Marketing Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+, WES recognised. Total all-in cost Rs 86,400 across 2 years, the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU. Marketing Management specialisation with Product and Brand Management, Services Marketing, Digital and Social Media Marketing, Sales and Distribution Management, and International Marketing in Sem 3-4. No EMI, no scholarships, no bundled perks.

sections.tldr: Galgotias Online MBA Marketing Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised, Rs 86,400 all-in (second-lowest after IGNOU Rs 66,000). Sem 3-4 covers Product and Brand Management, Services Marketing, Digital and Social Media Marketing, Sales and Distribution Management, and International Marketing. No EMI, no scholarships, no perks. Best fit for budget-first marketing professionals who want a legitimate NAAC A+ MBA at under Rs 1 lakh.

about.body:
Galgotias University, Greater Noida, was established in 2011 and holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The university is WES recognised for international credential evaluation.

The Online MBA in Marketing Management covers core MBA subjects in Sem 1-2 and adds marketing depth in Sem 3-4 with Product and Brand Management, Services Marketing, Digital and Social Media Marketing, Sales and Distribution Management, and International Marketing. Strategic Management and Business Communication are common Sem 3 subjects.

At Rs 86,400 all-in, Galgotias is the second-cheapest MBA on EdifyEdu after IGNOU (Rs 66,000). The trade-off: no EMI, no scholarships, no Coursera or Google Ads certification, no placement support, and limited brand recognition for marketing roles at top FMCG or agency firms compared to Amity or JAIN. For working professionals in sales, retail, or digital marketing who need a formal MBA credential at minimal cost, Galgotias Marketing Management is a budget-first option.

sem3Subjects.name: Product and Brand Management
sem3Subjects.description: Study product lifecycle management, brand positioning, brand equity measurement, new product development processes, and brand extension strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Services Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Apply the 7Ps framework to service industries. Covers service quality measurement (SERVQUAL), service blueprinting, and customer experience design.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital and Social Media Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Cover SEO, SEM, social media strategy, content marketing, email campaigns, analytics tools, and digital advertising across Google and Meta platforms.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Communication
sem3Subjects.description: Develop written and verbal communication for corporate settings. Covers report writing, presentation skills, and business correspondence.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse competitive environments using Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, and balanced scorecard frameworks. Build corporate and business-level strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Initial Phase)
sem3Subjects.description: Define research problem, conduct literature review, and finalise methodology for the MBA thesis project.

sem4Subjects.name: Sales and Distribution Management
sem4Subjects.description: Design sales force structures, territory planning, channel management strategies, and distribution network optimisation for FMCG, retail, and B2B businesses.

sem4Subjects.name: International Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Adapt marketing strategies for global markets. Covers market entry modes, global branding, cultural adaptation, and international pricing strategies.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Ethics and CSR
sem4Subjects.description: Examine ethical decision-making frameworks, corporate governance codes, CSR reporting standards, and stakeholder management.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis (Final Phase)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete data analysis, write findings, and defend the MBA thesis before the evaluation panel.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 core subjects are common across all Galgotias Online MBA specialisations. See the main Galgotias Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Marketing Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** FMCG and consumer goods, E-commerce and D2C brands, Digital marketing agencies, IT and SaaS companies, Retail and quick commerce, Media and advertising, Banking and insurance (marketing divisions)

**Entry-level roles:** Marketing Executive, Brand Associate, Digital Marketing Analyst, Sales Executive, Social Media Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Marketing Manager, Brand Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, Area Sales Manager, Product Marketing Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of Marketing, CMO, VP Sales, Director Brand Strategy, Chief Commercial Officer

**Typical hiring organisations:** Hindustan Unilever, ITC, Nestle, P&G, Amazon India, Flipkart, Zomato, Swiggy, Dentsu, Ogilvy, WPP, HDFC Bank (marketing), Bajaj Auto, Maruti Suzuki

Note: Galgotias does not offer dedicated placement support or corporate tie-ups for online MBA students. Career advancement depends on your existing network and self-sourced opportunities.

skills.body:
The Galgotias Marketing Management specialisation builds these skills across Sem 3-4:

**Technical skills:**
- Digital and Social Media Marketing: SEO and SEM execution, social media campaign design, Google Analytics interpretation, content marketing strategy, and paid advertising on Google and Meta platforms
- Product and Brand Management: brand positioning frameworks, brand equity measurement (Aaker model), product lifecycle management, and new product launch planning
- Sales and Distribution Management: sales territory design, channel partner management, distribution network optimisation, and sales forecasting

**Applied skills:**
- Services Marketing: 7Ps application, SERVQUAL measurement, service blueprinting, and customer experience mapping for service-sector businesses
- International Marketing: global market entry strategy, cultural adaptation of marketing mix, international pricing, and cross-border branding

**Soft skills:** Business communication for marketing presentations and client pitches, strategic management for marketing planning, ethical reasoning for advertising compliance and consumer protection.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Galgotias Online MBA Marketing Management against peers on EdifyEdu:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU is Rs 20,400 cheaper but does not offer a dedicated Marketing Management specialisation with subjects like Digital and Social Media Marketing or Brand Management. Galgotias has more marketing-specific depth.

**vs Amity Online MBA Marketing (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.6x the cost with NIRF #22 University ranking, larger alumni network in FMCG and advertising, and broader marketing curriculum. Amity brand carries stronger weight for marketing careers. Galgotias wins only on cost.

**vs Chandigarh University Online MBA Marketing (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 and offers PwC co-teaching modules. CU costs nearly 2x Galgotias. For marketing professionals who value institutional ranking and co-branded certification, CU justifies the premium.

**vs LPU Online MBA Marketing (Rs 1,61,000-2,00,000):** LPU offers zero-cost EMI, Coursera access, and NIRF #31 ranking. LPU provides stronger career services and a broader marketing curriculum. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is roughly half the price but lacks EMI, perks, and placement support.

**vs DPU Pune Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NAAC A++ with NIRF #41 ranking. DPU costs over 2x Galgotias and carries stronger brand recognition in Maharashtra. For Pune/Mumbai marketing careers, DPU brand weight justifies the premium.

fees.body:
Galgotias University Online MBA in Marketing Management has a single fee track with no EMI, no scholarships, and no bundled perks.

**Total all-in cost: Rs 86,400**

- Tuition fee: Rs 76,200 (Rs 33,000/year approx, paid per semester)
- Examination fee: Rs 8,000 (Rs 4,000/year)
- Registration fee: Rs 1,200 (one-time)
- Alumni fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)

**No EMI facility** from the university. No third-party EMI partner announced.
**No scholarships** or fee waivers available.
**No bundled perks** such as Google Ads certification, Coursera, or placement guarantees.

This is the second-lowest MBA fee on EdifyEdu after IGNOU at Rs 66,000. The fee advantage is the primary reason to consider Galgotias over NIRF-ranked competitors.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Galgotias each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Galgotias University, Greater Noida. It carries the MBA designation with Marketing Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is mentioned per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Galgotias Online MBA Marketing Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Prateek
items.liked: Digital and Social Media Marketing was well-structured with practical campaign examples. At Rs 86,400, this was the cheapest NAAC A+ marketing MBA I could find.
items.disliked: No Google Ads or HubSpot certification bundled. No placement support for marketing roles.
items.body: I work in digital marketing at a Delhi-NCR agency and needed an MBA for career progression to management roles. Galgotias gave me the degree at a price I could afford without loans. The digital marketing subject was relevant. Brand recognition at large FMCG firms is limited, but for agency and startup marketing roles, the credential checks the box.

items.name: Ananya
items.liked: Product and Brand Management gave me frameworks I now use in my FMCG role. The fee advantage over other universities is genuine and significant.
items.disliked: No Coursera access, no case study competitions, no marketing simulations. The learning is textbook-driven, not experiential.
items.body: Decent programme for the price point. If you can afford Rs 1.5L or more, LPU or CU will give you Coursera access, better brand recognition, and actual career services. If Rs 86,400 is your real budget ceiling, Galgotias Marketing Management is a functional choice.

items.name: Vishal
items.liked: Sales and Distribution Management was directly applicable to my FMCG sales role. International Marketing added useful export perspective. The LMS was easy to use.
items.disliked: No EMI option. Had to save up before each semester payment. Alumni network for marketing professionals is non-existent.
items.body: For sales and marketing professionals in UP and Delhi-NCR who need an MBA under Rs 1 lakh, Galgotias is a practical pick. The subjects are relevant, the platform works, and the degree is NAAC A+ accredited. Just set realistic expectations about brand recognition and career support.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias Online MBA Marketing include digital marketing subjects?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Sem 3 curriculum includes Digital and Social Media Marketing covering SEO, SEM, social media strategy, content marketing, and digital advertising on Google and Meta platforms.

faqs.question: Is this MBA useful for FMCG marketing careers?
faqs.answer: The curriculum covers Product and Brand Management, Sales and Distribution Management, and Services Marketing, which are directly relevant to FMCG marketing roles. However, top FMCG companies may prefer candidates from NIRF-ranked MBA programmes with stronger brand recognition.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias bundle any marketing certifications?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not bundle Google Ads, HubSpot, Coursera, or any third-party marketing certifications. You can pursue these certifications independently.

faqs.question: How does Galgotias Marketing MBA compare to LPU?
faqs.answer: LPU Online MBA Marketing costs Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) or Rs 2,00,000 standard, with zero-cost EMI, Coursera access, and NIRF #31 ranking. LPU offers stronger career services. Galgotias at Rs 86,400 is roughly half the cost but lacks EMI, Coursera, and placement support.

faqs.question: Does Galgotias offer EMI for the marketing MBA?
faqs.answer: No. Galgotias does not offer any EMI facility or third-party EMI partner. The fee is paid directly to the university per semester.

chooseIf: Your top priority is the lowest possible fee for a NAAC A+ MBA with marketing focus. At Rs 86,400, Galgotias is second only to IGNOU.
You already work in sales, retail, or digital marketing and need a formal MBA credential for promotion, not brand prestige or agency placements.
You need a WES-recognised marketing MBA for international credential evaluation at minimal cost.
consider: If FMCG or agency brand recognition matters, Amity Online MBA Marketing (NIRF #22, Rs 2,25,000) carries stronger weight in consumer goods and advertising hiring.
If you need EMI and Coursera access, LPU Online MBA Marketing at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) offers 24-month zero-cost EMI with Coursera bundled.
If you want the absolute cheapest MBA, IGNOU at Rs 66,000 is Rs 20,400 less, though it lacks a dedicated Marketing Management specialisation.
